hero.name: Nithun Manoharan
hero.intro: In my daily life I work in IT as a product manager, but on this site I will show you what I'm building in my free time, with a healthy dose of AI. I also want to let out my creative spirit and write my thoughts on both reality and fiction. No promises as of yet.
hero.teaser: The best is yet to come. Soon™

silence.heading: Silence
silence.subtitle: A small tool for tinnitus and sleep. Tap a sound to play; adjust to your preference.
silence.guidance: Based on Tinnitus Retraining Therapy (TRT) principles: set the volume so the sound sits just below the level of your tinnitus — not to mask it completely. The goal is habituation over time, not suppression.
silence.donationIntro: If this tool helps you, please consider donating to research and advocacy. These organisations were chosen for being credible and focused on hearing loss and tinnitus research.
silence.audioError: Audio couldn't start. Please tap Play again.
silence.iosMuteNote: If you hear no sound, check that your mute switch is off. On iPhone, the side switch may silence audio even when volume is up.
